title: Is FedEx (FDX) a Buy as Wall Street Analysts Look Optimistic?
text: The recommendations of Wall Street analysts are often relied on by investors when deciding whether to buy, sell, or hold a stock. Media reports about these brokerage-firm-employed (or sell-side) analysts changing their ratings often affect a stock's price.

title: FedEx: An Industrial Stock Poised For Capital Appreciation
text: FedEx is likely to generate alpha through inevitable package volume growth and a focus upon expense management. Package volume for FedEx Express has eased in recent years but is expected to improve as the global economies strengthen. Expense management is a current priority. A new CEO is driving to align expenses with the business and consolidate the FedEx Express, Ground and Freight segments into one.

title: FedEx Corp. Board Declares Quarterly Dividend
text: MEMPHIS, Tenn.--(BUSINESS WIRE)--The Board of Directors of FedEx Corp. (NYSE: FDX) today declared a quarterly cash dividend of $1.26 per share on FedEx Corp. common stock. The dividend is payable October 2, 2023 to stockholders of record at the close of business on September 11, 2023. FedEx Corp. (NYSE: FDX) provides customers and businesses worldwide with a broad portfolio of transportation, e-commerce and business services. title: Five Facts About Philanthropy During the 2023 FedEx St. Jude Championship
text: MEMPHIS, Tenn.--(BUSINESS WIRE)--The 2023 FedEx St. Jude Championship will officially kick off the FedEx Cup on Thursday, Aug. 10. title: Celebrating Art for a Cause: St. Jude Children's Research Hospital Patient Artwork Featured During 2023 FedEx St. Jude Championship, Available in Fan Shop and Charity Auction
text: MEMPHIS, Tenn.--(BUSINESS WIRE)--A philanthropic tradition continues as art by St. Jude Children's Research Hospital® patients will be featured throughout the 2023 FedEx St. Jude Championship, Aug. 10-13 at TPC Southwind. For the first time, St. Jude patient art head covers will be available for purchase at the on-site PGA TOUR Fan Shop and online to support the lifesaving mission of St. Jude: Finding cures.
